purpose: Generate a code-grounded interaction sketch for the Runweave iOS terminal detail composer redesign.

codeFacts.currentPageStructure: IonPage > IonContent > terminal-page-shell with header, terminal body, and bottom TerminalCommandComposer.
codeFacts.currentComposer: A footer with IonTextarea and a text Send IonButton.
codeFacts.currentInputPath: TerminalCommandComposer calls onSendInput(text + newline); AppTerminalPage passes useAppTerminalConnection().sendInput.
codeFacts.stopCapabilityAlreadyExists: Ctrl-C can be sent through sendInput('\u0003'); backend websocket protocol also supports a signal message with SIGINT, but App hook currently exposes only sendInput.
codeFacts.imageCapabilityAlreadyExistsOutsideApp: Backend exposes POST /api/terminal/session/:id/clipboard-image and Web frontend has createTerminalSessionClipboardImage(); App does not yet expose an image picker service.

targetBehaviorShown.chooseImage: Show a leading image/add attachment button as the entry point only. Do not show uploaded thumbnail previews or success states.
targetBehaviorShown.inputText: Show one auto-growing mobile chat-style text field with placeholder 'Type a command...'.
targetBehaviorShown.send: Show a compact circular send button when there is typed text.
targetBehaviorShown.stop: Show the same trailing circular action in stop mode with a square stop icon when the terminal has an active command and is still connected/running; this maps to Ctrl-C/SIGINT behavior.
targetBehaviorShown.noShortcutBar: Do not render the existing TerminalShortcutBar in the sketch because AppTerminalPage does not currently mount it.

visualConstraints.theme: Runweave dark terminal theme from current AppTerminalPage
visualConstraints.layout: Keep the existing terminal detail page: compact header, full terminal output area, bottom safe-area composer.
visualConstraints.composerStyle: Modern mobile chatbox composer inspired by common iOS/Ionic chat inputs: translucent dark bottom bar, rounded input capsule, icon-only buttons, stable 44px tap targets.
visualConstraints.colors: Use the existing dark palette: page #05070b, terminal #0b1220, header #0c1118, text #eef3f8, muted #9aa8b6, connected green #42d986.
visualConstraints.textPolicy: No explanatory product text, no labels that describe features. Use only realistic terminal header/status text, terminal output, placeholder text, and iconography.
visualConstraints.accuracy: Do not show git branch, AI status, image thumbnails, file upload progress, or backend fields not present in the current App terminal page code.

imagePrompt: Create a high-fidelity mobile app interaction sketch for the current Runweave iOS terminal detail page. It must be grounded in the existing code: the screen has a compact dark header with back button, terminal title, cwd subtitle, connected status, a full-height terminal output area, and a bottom TerminalCommandComposer. Redesign only the bottom composer as a modern mobile chatbox. The bottom composer is a translucent dark safe-area bar. Inside it, place a left circular icon-only image/add attachment button, a rounded auto-growing input capsule with placeholder 'Type a command...', and a right circular action button. Show two stacked mini state callouts within the same sketch: normal typing state with an up-arrow send icon, and running command state with a square stop icon. The stop state maps to Ctrl-C/SIGINT and should not invent new backend UI. Keep visual style consistent with Ionic/iOS chat inputs: 44px tap targets, soft 16-22px radii, subtle borders, no heavy card nesting. Do not show uploaded image thumbnails, upload progress, git branch, AI labels, or feature explanation text. Use Runweave dark colors: black page, #0b1220 terminal, #0c1118 header/composer, #eef3f8 text, #9aa8b6 muted text, #42d986 status dot. The terminal output should look like realistic logs and shell prompt, but the focus is the composer design.
